title: libpod/image/pull: Return image-pulling errors from doPullImage
body:
We were already writing these to our debug logs.  But collecting them and including them in the error message will make it easier for callers who don't have debugging enabled to figure out what's going wrong.

Fixes #1212.
Mitigates #1451.

There's discussion in #1212 about handling this in a centralized location where buildah can share it.  But it's just a few lines, so I've just fixed it locally here.  If someone comes around later with a shared-location fix, they can blow my additions away and replace them with their thing.  Until then, this PR should be enough to help `podman pull` callers figure out their problems.

comments.body: In the stop-gap direction, I'm happy to port this to buildah for projectatomic/buildah#849 if/when it lands here.

I like it, and we do need something like this for buildah.

LGTM

:pushpin: Commit 7e756ed has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 7e756edf706e071efd6ee531bde66e3141737946 -->
The code LGTM, do you have any sample output with at least a couple failures?

> ... do you have any sample output with at least a couple failures?

See the commit message.

[Homu error][1] was:

```
f0a3a432 "Add notes to check version on problem" ... FAIL
 - FAIL - has whitespace errors. See `git show --check f0a3a4329ecaaadd60331641712d5e9b35e1120f`.
```

Dunno how that got in, but we may need to bump the epoch.

[1]: https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/containers/libpod/7ef2625f287e598720b97f78cef14a5fba95bc60.0.1536934625639643087/output.log
Epoch has been bumped. Gitvalidation likes to find these things only after they merge, despite the fact that it runs as part of CI and checks every merge.

@wking maybe I've been looking at too many PR's today, but I'm not seeing output from a  `libpod pull alpine` type of command with multiple errors being returned from your patch in the commit message.
Thanks @wking.  I was looking at the message at the top of the GitHub page and not seeing it there.  The new messages look good to me, thank for the pointer.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/containers/libpod/2188d8f7ada15caddd8b721745a0a4b6f61ce111.1536939141083384832/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing 2188d8f7ada15caddd8b721745a0a4b6f61ce111 to master...
